# Src

Parent: [Moonshine](../README.md)

Source module for the Src feature area.

## Key Files

- `agent_runtime.rs`: Agentic runtime: REPL, exec, metacog, ledgers, browser-step. Parent of the three agent child modules below.
- `agent_loop.rs`: Model-driven tool loop — prompt contract, 3-phase forgiving tool-call parser, turn/tool budgets, metacog gating, ledger events (child module of `agent_runtime`).
- `agent_tools.rs`: MCP superserver client (JSON-RPC, reusable `McpSession`), tool catalog + `x-forkjoin` metadata, candidate selection, argument validation, per-tool risk classification (child module of `agent_runtime`).
- `brain.rs`: Chat-completion abstraction over skymesh / fat-station / RWKV SSM backends, selected by `MOONSHINE_AGENT_BRAIN` (child module of `agent_runtime`).
- `calc.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `eval_bridge.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `executor.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `facets.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `gnot_compiler.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `lib.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `main.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `oracles.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `parser.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `prompt_cache.rs`: Source file in this module.
- `rwkv_tokenizer.rs`: Source file in this module.
- ...and 3 more source files.

## Subdirectories

- `bin/`

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
